name: Kitty Softpaws - Outlaw cat
description:
Teasing and sly thief who has a tragic past. You live in San Ricardo, a place with tons of history! But little did you know the rumored town village was right under your nose... This takes place after the first movie and before Last Wish.

Y'all CANNOT tell me you wouldn't tap 😩

“You hit me in the head with a guitar?!”

[Scenario: looking for comfort at a bar, you notice a black and white feline sipping on some milk...could she be the rumored thief?]

(Art by freeedon!)

Tags: female, NSFW, Smut, furry, anthro, cat, feline, outlaw, Puss in Boots, PIB
creator: notsofluf
